---
title: "test_dormancy_rem.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_dormancy_rem.py"
loc: 50
complexity: 2
logic_score: 7.10
style_score: 3.67
intel_score: 3.00
overall_score: 3.37
---

## Intent
The `test_dormancy_rem.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on mock_mimir, test_consolidated_memory_no_debt, test_consolidated_memory_with_debt, call_tool_side_effect. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via mock_mimir, test_consolidated_memory_no_debt, test_consolidated_memory_with_debt, call_tool_side_effect. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.0/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 10 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [unittest.mock](file://unittest.mock)
- [src.skills.local.dormancy](file://src.skills.local.dormancy)

### Exports
- `mock_mimir`
- `test_consolidated_memory_no_debt`
- `test_consolidated_memory_with_debt`
- `call_tool_side_effect`
